security_gap.gap_description: Vote input may be spoofed without signature verification.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system accepts unsigned votes from external actors.

assumptions: The governance contract does not enforce signature verification for vote messages.
The actor is able to access the voting interface without authentication.

mitigation.strategy: Require signature-based vote authentication and role validation.

description: An attacker may impersonate a user and submit fraudulent votes to the governance contract.

security_gap.gap_description: Vote input may be modified without detection.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system lacks tamper-evident mechanisms for vote submissions.

assumptions: The governance contract does not provide tamper-evident mechanisms for vote messages.
The actor can modify the vote data in transit before submission.

mitigation.strategy: Implement mechanisms to detect tampering with vote messages (e.g., digital signatures, hash verification).

description: An attacker may modify the content of a vote before submission to the governance contract.

security_gap.gap_description: The system does not provide mechanisms for non-repudiation of votes.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system lacks mechanisms for verifying the origin and authenticity of votes.

assumptions: The governance contract does not log or record vote submissions with sufficient non-repudiation properties.
The actor could deny having submitted a particular vote.

mitigation.strategy: Employ techniques for non-repudiation such as digital signatures and audit logging.

description: An attacker may cast a vote and later deny having done so.

security_gap.gap_description: Votes may be exposed before processing or during storage.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system may lack confidentiality safeguards for vote data.

assumptions: Vote data is not adequately protected during transmission or storage.
The actor could intercept or access the vote data.

mitigation.strategy: Use HTTPS for secure transmission and encrypt vote data at rest.

description: An attacker may intercept or access vote data before or after processing.
